final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat official account article cover image for a fragrance new product launch campaign named "染秋".

Style/medium: needs a high-end, luxurious quality aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the title as the dominant focal element
Subject: must include the "染秋" fragrance new product launch theme
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumnal atmosphere — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, premium mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-toned direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a high-quality, tactile surface treatment — exact grain / sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (primary title, large, dominant), "秋意染染 时光留香" (subtitle, secondary)
Constraints: must preserve 900×500 horizontal aspect ratio; title must be visually prominent
Avoid:
